headline: Is Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Still Attractive After A 69% One Year Share Price Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Marathon Petroleum's recent share price puts it on sale or stretches its value, the next sections will walk through what the current numbers actually say. At a last close of US$266.17, the stock shows returns of 2.9% over 7 days, 8.7% over 30 days, 61.2% year to date and 69.3% over 1 year, with a very large gain over 5 years. Recent news coverage has focused on Marathon Petroleum as a major US refiner and fuels supplier, with attention on how market conditions...
